title: Designpowers agent evidence envelope
description: The output contract shared by every Designpowers v2 agent, honored identically by every runner. Narrative fields (summary, fix wording) are JUDGMENT and may differ between runners. The `evidence` block on each finding and the `tool_calls` array are TRUTH — copied verbatim from MCP tool results — and MUST be identical across runners for the same input. This is what the anti-drift conformance suite checks.

contract_version.description: Semver of the agent contract this envelope satisfies.

verdict.description: Overall judgment. 'fail' if any critical finding exists.

summary.description: JUDGMENT. 2-3 sentence human summary. May vary between runners.

findings.description: One entry per issue (or notable pass). Ordered most severe first.

severity.description: critical = blocks access; major = significant degradation; minor = improvement; pass = verified good.

claim.description: JUDGMENT. What the critic asserts, in plain language.

evidence.description: TRUTH. The MCP tool result this claim rests on. Verbatim — must be identical across runners.

affected.description: JUDGMENT. Who is harmed (disability types / situational contexts).

tool_calls.description: TRUTH. Every MCP tool result the agent obtained, verbatim structuredContent. The conformance suite asserts on this. An agent that asserts a contrast fact with no corresponding tool_call is violating its contract.

source.description: Which MCP tool produced this, e.g. 'designpowers-accessibility/check_contrast'.
